amendatorysection.para: Sections 71-561 to 71-569 shall be known and may be cited as the Aging, Alzheimer's, and Dementia Support Act.

source.note: The Revisor of Statutes has pursuant to section 49-769 correlated LB867, section 13, with LB913, section 1, to reflect all amendments.
Changes made by LB867 became operative July 18, 2026. Changes made by LB913 became effective July 18, 2026.
